untranslatable_reason: This signal requires multi-market price divergence detection across two separate markets with real-time bid-ask spread comparison. The allowed indicators are single-market OHLCV-based technical indicators. Multi-market arbitrage logic, cross-venue price divergence measurement, bid-ask spread ratio comparison, and order execution fill tracking are not representable in the single-market indicator framework provided.
translation_notes: Signal MICROSTRUCTURE_DRY_1_1 describes a statistical arbitrage/market microstructure strategy requiring: (1) real-time divergence calculation between two market prices, (2) bid-ask spread data from both venues, (3) execution tracking (fills vs. time elapsed), (4) order routing logic. None of these can be expressed with close, volume, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, or Stochastic indicators alone. This is a structural limitation of single-venue technical analysis frameworks applied to multi-venue arbitrage.
